{{Quote|Darklighter, Klivian. Assemble your flyboys. I want that craft engaged.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Heliesk]]|<ref name="Empire 9">[[Empire 9|''Empire'' 9]]</ref>}}
'''Twilight Squadron''' was the name of the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] based aboard [[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']] in the time prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Its members included [[Delund]], [[Peate Kurin]], [[Tars Nandy]] and was commanded by [[First Mate/Legends|First Mate]] [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] and [[Second Mate]] [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]]. The squadron intercepted the civilian transport ''[[Lark]]'' in the [[Bestine system/Legends|Bestine system]], resulting in the destruction of the ship by Nandy and the death of all its passengers.

[[File:Twilightescape.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Twilight Squadron makes their escape from the [[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']].]]

Most of the squadron joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] with the defection of ''Rand Ecliptic''. Tars Nandy was arrested by Klivian for his implication in the destruction of the ''Lark''. All of its TIEs were deliberately destroyed during the [[Strike at an Incom Corporation facility|raid]] on the [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] assembly facility. They were modified in order to be controlled by [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]] and used to lure the Imperial forces. The four pilots managed to eject before being pursued by Imperial TIE fighters but Kurin was accidentally killed and Hobbie lost a leg.

Two of its three surviving members, Darklighter and Klivian, later joined [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] for the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

*[[Empire 9|''Empire'' 9]] {{1st}}
